task_completion.description: The agent logs into Emoncms using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Emoncms login page is visible with 'admin' entered, or the Emoncms dashboard is visible indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the account settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser URL shows 'localhost/user/view' (or similar path) and the 'My Account' or user profile settings form is displayed.

task_completion.description: The agent changes the Timezone setting to 'Europe/London'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Timezone dropdown or input field in the account settings form explicitly shows 'Europe/London' selected.

task_completion.description: The agent changes the Email address to 'admin@greenbuilding.co.uk'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Email text field in the account settings form contains exactly 'admin@greenbuilding.co.uk'.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the updated profile settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save/update button is clicked, a success message (e.g., 'Saved' or 'Profile updated') is visible, or the page reflects the new values after a reload.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Emoncms GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) being used, rather than terminal commands (like curl or mysql) to update the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Emoncms application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Emoncms web interface is visible and functional, not a text editor or a static mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to manipulate the DOM text directly to show the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected timezone is 'Europe/London' (a valid IANA timezone identifier) and the expected email is 'admin@greenbuilding.co.uk'. The target user account being modified is 'admin'.
